name: Air / Solo - Glass Mouthpiece 90mm
summary: The innovative design of the glass pod serves as both a pod and mouthpiece, making it user-friendly and easy to maintain.
description: The innovative design of the glass pod serves as both a pod and mouthpiece, making it user-friendly and easy to maintain. Its dual functionality enables precise dosing and it is environmentally conscious as it can be reused or recycled. Compatible with multiple Arizer devices including Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser. This mouthpiece is a versatile choice. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
